name: part_004

scenes.description: Kaela Kovalskia, Vestia Zeta, and Kobo Kanaeru talk on stage between performances, interacting with the audience and reflecting on the concert's highlights.

subtitles.original: Kalau enggak boleh...
...rebutan komidi sama Zeta...
...hmm, ya sudahlah.
Kita main aja deh sama penonton.
subtitles.english: Let's just play with the audience.

subtitles.original: Kobo pengin deh coba kita teriakin penonton...
subtitles.english: Kobo wants to try shouting at the audience...

subtitles.original: ...karena kan tadi mereka sudah teriakin kita.
Maksudnya kita teriakin intro kita bareng penonton-tachi!
subtitles.english: I mean, let's shout our intro together with the audience!

subtitles.original: Betul! Teriaknya bareng penonton, jangan teriakin penontonnya.
subtitles.english: Right! Shout with the audience, not at them.

subtitles.original: Iya gitu maksudnya.
Soalnya kan habis ini kita harus nyanyi...
subtitles.english: Because we have to sing after this...

subtitles.original: ...jadi kita harus simpan suara dulu enggak sih?
Betul, ya. Enggak bakal selama itu ternyata...
subtitles.english: True. It won't be that long actually...

subtitles.original: ...tenang aja enggak bakal selama...
subtitles.english: ...don't worry, it won't be as long as...

subtitles.original: ...durasi stream Kaela gitu ya guys ya.
Ya sudahlah mau teriak-teriak ya sudah, aku enggak masalah lah, aku ikut.
subtitles.english: Fine, if you want to shout, I don't mind, I'm in.

subtitles.original: Aku ikut! Gimana nih semuanya, sudah siap belum?
subtitles.english: I'm in! How about it, everyone, are you ready?

subtitles.original: Siap!
Siap nih kayaknya, oke!
Kobo dulu ya.
Aku mau kita sama-sama teriak Baka-Baka-Baka!
subtitles.english: I want us to all shout Baka-Baka-Baka together!

subtitles.original: Oke, siap ya!
Satu, dua, tiga!
BAKA-BAKA-BAKA!
Suka-suka! Giliran Zeta, giliran Zeta.
Pas aku bilang "Mission Starto",
kalian bareng-bareng teriak "Starto" ya.
Siap? Aaa... Mission...
...Starto!
STARTO!
Oke, habis ini Kaela.
Oke, oke, oke. Nah, nih ya
buat semua penonton sama HoloHeros juga...
subtitles.english: all the audience and HoloHeros too...

subtitles.original: ...kalau misalkan aku bilang "HoloHeros!", kalian bilang "Hu Ha!".
subtitles.english: ...if I say "HoloHeros!", you guys say "Hu Ha!".

subtitles.original: Gampang kan?
Langsung, langsung, langsung!
Oke ya, siap ya. HoloHeros!
HU HA!
Mantap! Mantap, mantap, mantap!
Keren, keren, keren. Akhirnya Gen 3 kompak juga.
subtitles.english: Cool, cool, cool. Finally, Gen 3 is in sync.

subtitles.original: Iya kompak.
Kelihatannya masih pada semangat nih ya.
subtitles.english: Looks like everyone is still energetic.

subtitles.original: Soalnya dari lagu pertama kita hari ini aja sudah kerasa banget.
subtitles.english: Because it's already been so felt since our first song today.

subtitles.original: Kalian tuh pada nyangka enggak sih kalau lagu pertama kita tuh bakal 100%?
subtitles.english: Did you guys expect our first song would be 100%?

subtitles.original: Beuh, mana ada yang nyangka.
Aku aja sendiri enggak nyangka juga.
subtitles.english: Even I didn't expect it myself.

subtitles.original: Langsung dibuka dengan Hoshinova mode gitu.
subtitles.english: Opening straight with that Hoshinova mode.

subtitles.original: Keren banget kan?
Keren banget sih, apalagi tadi Zeta sama nyanyi...
subtitles.english: It was so cool, especially earlier when Zeta sang...

subtitles.original: Zeta sama nyanyi...
Zeta sama Kaela nyanyi 100% tuh sudah kayak real 100% ya.
subtitles.english: Zeta and Kaela sang 100% and it was like real 100%.

subtitles.original: Itu tuh bisa enggak sih enggak sekeren tadi? Aku tuh jadi ingin kayak...
subtitles.english: How could it be that cool? It made me go like...

subtitles.original: ...ugh, ugh gitu kan. Kalian pernah enggak sih nyanyi lagu sekeren tadi?
subtitles.english: ...ugh, ugh. Have you guys ever sung a song as cool as that?

subtitles.original: Aura farming ya?
Aura farming sesungguhnya keren banget emang lagunya Moona.
subtitles.english: Aura farming indeed, Moona's song is really cool.

subtitles.original: Emang kan Zeta kan soalnya biasanya lagu-lagu yang stylish...
subtitles.english: Right, because Zeta usually does stylish songs...

subtitles.original: ...yang jazzy-jazzy gitu.
Jadi tadi pas dinyanyiin tuh ya, 100%, rasanya jadi beda banget vibes-nya.
subtitles.english: So when she sang that, 100%, the vibes felt so different.

subtitles.original: Terus Kaela juga...
...tadi nerap ya, tadadadadada, kayak apa tuh?
subtitles.english: ...rapping earlier, tadadadadada, like what was that?

subtitles.original: Pokoknya keren banget.
Keren banget ya tadi.
Tapi habis ini tuh masih ada lagi, New Zombie.
subtitles.english: But after this, there's more, New Zombie.

subtitles.original: Ayo pada tahu dong ini lagu siapa.
subtitles.english: Come on, you guys must know whose song this is.

subtitles.original: Tahulah, senpai kita, senpai kita.
subtitles.english: Of course, our senior's, our senior's.

subtitles.original: Tadi tuh itu ya, HoloRo tuh perform-nya juga
keren banget kayak lagi di game gitu.
subtitles.english: so cool, like being in a game.

subtitles.original: Betul, setuju. Terus tadi ada back dancer-nya men!
subtitles.english: True, agreed. And there were back dancers, man!

subtitles.original: Keren ya guys? Keren enggak?
subtitles.english: Cool right, guys? Isn't it cool?

subtitles.original: Keren!
Ada apa lagi tuh tadi? Lampu laser...
subtitles.english: What else was there earlier? Laser lights...

subtitles.original: ...terus ada efek kembang api segala.
subtitles.english: ...then there were firework effects and all.

subtitles.original: Terus banyaklah ya gimmick-gimmick yang wow.
Itu back dancer nanti aku hire semua ya buat solo konser aku.
subtitles.english: I'll hire all those back dancers later for my solo concert.

subtitles.original: Wah, sudah ngomong konser solo aja.
subtitles.english: Whoa, already talking about a solo concert.

subtitles.original: Ini omongan adalah doa ya.
Tapi konser yang ini belum selesai!
subtitles.english: But this concert isn't over yet!

subtitles.original: Eh, tapi kalian tahu enggak sih sebelum ini tuh nyanyiin lagu apa?
subtitles.english: Wait, but do you guys know what song was sung before this?

subtitles.original: Eh, aku mah tahu banget lah. Itu lagu terbaru aku, "Dalah".
subtitles.english: Oh, I definitely know. That's my newest song, "Dalah".

subtitles.original: Ya sudahlah.
Iya, "Dalah".
Enggak usah dibahas.
Ya sudahlah.
Lho kok gitu?
Itu tuh maksudnya judulnya "Dalah", lagunya judulnya "Dalah".
subtitles.english: I mean the title is "Dalah", the song's title is "Dalah".

subtitles.original: Oh, dalah. Iya, dalah. Bilang dong!
subtitles.english: Oh, dalah. Yeah, dalah. Say so!

subtitles.original: Habisnya kamu kan sering "dalah dalah" gitu.
Jadi dikira memang beneran "dalah".
subtitles.english: So I thought you were really just done.

subtitles.original: Entar dalah-dalah, pulang dia.
subtitles.english: Later you'll "dalah" and just go home.

subtitles.original: Pulang nanti, kasihan yang anda.
Kalau gitu "Dalah" tuh maksudnya apa sih?
Dalah" sama kehidupan. Hidup tuh berat ya guys ya.
subtitles.english: "Dalah" with life. Life is heavy, guys.

subtitles.original: Kalau hidup berat ya sudah, dalah aja. Habis itu lanjutkan hidupmu, begitu.
subtitles.english: If life is heavy, well, "dalah" it. After that, continue your life, like that.

subtitles.original: Iya betul teman-teman, di kehidupan yang dewasa ini ya.
subtitles.english: That's right friends, in this adult life.
